metadata.description: Shared practices, tools, and workflows for working with Claude

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills: analyze changes and create grouped conventional commits with QA and hook compliance

plugins.name: goal
plugins.description: Goal-driven agent workflow: plan a Definition of Done with the operator, then execute it autonomously to a validated result

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian dashboard sync skills: resolve the active client by discovery and read/write a Dashboard.md without hardcoding client names

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Plan-to-implementation handoff: package planning output into committed day plans and per-ticket briefs a fresh Claude Code session can execute alone
